common.forbidden: You do not have permission to access this page.
common.comingSoon: This feature is not yet available.
common.scopeRequired: This page is available only for a single customer. Narrow the customer scope to one customer to continue.

auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

deny.title: Access Denied
deny.accountInactive: Your account has been suspended or disabled. Please contact an administrator.
deny.noAccess: You do not have access to any customer workspace. Please request an invitation from a manager.
deny.genericError: An error occurred during sign-in. Please try again.
deny.adminMfaRequired: Multi-factor authentication is required for System Admin access. Please configure TOTP or WebAuthn.
deny.adminAuthTooOld: Your authentication has expired. System Admin sign-in must be completed within 5 minutes.
deny.adminRoleMissing: You do not have the System Admin role. Contact an administrator to request access.
deny.adminNotEligible: Your account is not eligible for System Admin access.
deny.invitationExpired: This invitation has expired or is no longer valid. Please request a new invitation.
deny.invitationEmailMismatch: The email address you signed in with does not match the invited email. Please sign in with the correct account.
deny.invitationEmailNotVerified: Your email address has not been verified. Please verify your email before accepting the invitation.
deny.bridgeExpired: The bridge connection has expired or was already used. Please initiate a new connection from AICE.
deny.bridgeCustomerMismatch: The customer scope sent from AICE does not match what is registered for this environment in Clumit Insight. This usually means the operator who registered the AICE environment used a different customer identifier than the one AICE is sending. Please report this configuration error to your operator with the time of the failure so they can reconcile the registration.
deny.bridgeCustomerInactive: Sign-in for this customer is currently disabled in Clumit Insight. The customer record exists but is not active. Please wait for the operator to reactivate the customer, then try again. If you need urgent access, contact your operator.
deny.bridgeEnvironmentInactive: Sign-in for this AICE environment is currently disabled in Clumit Insight. The environment is registered but not active. Please wait for the operator to reactivate the environment, then try again. If you need urgent access, contact your operator.
deny.bridgeNoAccess: You are signed in, but your account is not authorized for the customer that AICE asked you to access. If you should be a member of that customer, ask a Manager of that customer to invite you. If you should be assigned to that customer as an analyst, ask a System Administrator to add you to the analyst assignment. Until then, you cannot continue with this bridge sign-in.
deny.contactAdmin: If you believe this is an error, please contact your system administrator.

members.title: Members
members.description: Manage members and invitations for your organization.
members.name: Name
members.lastManagerTooltip: This member is the only Manager. Their role cannot be changed and they cannot be removed.
members.removeMemberConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from this organization? This action cannot be undone.
members.inviteDescription: Send an invitation email to add a new member.
members.inviteAlreadyMember: This email is already a member of the organization.
members.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke the invitation for {email}?
members.actionError: An error occurred. Please try again.
members.lastManagerError: Cannot remove or demote the last Manager.

auditLogs.title: Audit Logs
auditLogs.description: Search and filter system audit logs.
auditLogs.errorLoading: Failed to load audit logs. Please try again.

suspiciousActivity.title: Account Anomalies
suspiciousActivity.description: Detected account and session anomalies from audit logs.
suspiciousActivity.errorLoading: Failed to load alerts. Please try again.

adminAccounts.title: Accounts
adminAccounts.description: Manage system accounts and their status.
adminAccounts.suspendConfirm: Are you sure you want to suspend {name}? All active sessions will be terminated immediately.
adminAccounts.unsuspendConfirm: Are you sure you want to unsuspend {name}? The account will be able to sign in again.
adminAccounts.actionError: Failed to update account status. Please try again.
adminAccounts.errorLoading: Failed to load accounts. Please try again.

adminCustomers.title: Customers
adminCustomers.description: Manage customers and their database provisioning status.
adminCustomers.name: Name
adminCustomers.createDescription: Create a new customer with a dedicated database.
adminCustomers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This will permanently remove the customer, its database, and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
adminCustomers.errorLoading: Failed to load customers. Please try again.
adminCustomers.actionError: An error occurred. Please try again.
adminCustomers.editDescription: Update the customer's name, external key, or description.
adminCustomers.externalKeyHelp: external_key must be a globally unique business identifier (e.g., domain, business registration number, contract code). The same value must be entered on aice-web-next under coordinated agreement via an out-of-band secure channel. Mismatches surface as bridge_customer_mismatch denials. Run a bridge test right after registration or change to verify the mapping.
adminCustomers.externalKeyChangeWarning: external_key is the customer mapping identifier shared with aice-web-next. After this change, the same value must be set on aice-web-next for the mapping to be preserved. Run a bridge test immediately to verify. Continue?
adminCustomers.errorExternalKeyConflict: Another customer already uses this external key.
adminCustomers.errorExternalKeyTooLong: external_key must be 256 characters or fewer.
adminCustomers.errorExternalKeyInvalidCharacters: external_key must not contain control characters.
adminCustomers.errorNameTooLong: Name must be 256 characters or fewer.
adminCustomers.errorNameInvalidCharacters: Name must not contain control characters.
adminCustomers.errorDescriptionTooLong: Description must be 1024 characters or fewer.
adminCustomers.errorDescriptionInvalidCharacters: Description must not contain control characters.

adminEnvironments.title: Environments
adminEnvironments.description: Manage AICE environments, customer mappings, and trust registry keys.
adminEnvironments.name: Name
adminEnvironments.createDescription: Register a new AICE environment. Optionally include a trust registry key.
adminEnvironments.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? All customer mappings and trust registry keys will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
adminEnvironments.errorLoading: Failed to load environments. Please try again.
adminEnvironments.actionError: An error occurred. Please try again.
adminEnvironments.linkCustomerDescription: Add a customer to this environment.
adminEnvironments.noLinkedCustomers: No customers linked to this environment.
adminEnvironments.registerKeyDescription: Register a new public key for this environment.
adminEnvironments.removeKeyConfirm: Remove key {kid} from issuer {issuer}? This action cannot be undone.
adminEnvironments.noKeys: No trust registry keys for this environment.
adminEnvironments.aiceIdConflict: An environment with this AICE ID already exists.
adminEnvironments.invalidPublicKey: Invalid JWK JSON. Please check the format.
adminEnvironments.thumbprintInstruction: Compare these values out-of-band against the thumbprint shown on aice-web-next. The base64url form is canonical; the hex form is provided as a visual aid.
adminEnvironments.thumbprintError: Failed to compute thumbprint. Please try again.
adminEnvironments.thumbprintConfirm: I confirmed the thumbprint matches the value shown on aice-web-next.
adminEnvironments.keyExpiresAtHelp: Leave blank for soft-expiry (governed by enabled only). Provide a timezone-explicit ISO 8601 datetime (Z or ±HH:MM) to enforce hard expiry.
adminEnvironments.keyExpiresAtInvalid: Expires At must be a timezone-explicit ISO 8601 datetime.

adminAdmins.title: System Admins
adminAdmins.description: Designate or revoke System Admin privileges. Maximum {max} admins allowed.
adminAdmins.designateDescription: Select an account to designate as System Admin. The account will receive the aimer_admin Keycloak realm role and admin portal access.
adminAdmins.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke admin privileges from {name}? All admin sessions will be terminated immediately.
adminAdmins.actionError: An error occurred. Please try again.
adminAdmins.alreadyAdmin: This account is already an admin.
adminAdmins.errorLoading: Failed to load admins. Please try again.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

customerSettings.rangesDescription: Public IP ranges registered here are redacted by the analysis engine when they appear in event payloads.
customerSettings.rangesEmptyBanner: No public IP ranges registered. All public IPs are being redacted by default.
customerSettings.rangeAddGenericError: Could not add the range. Please try again.
customerSettings.rangeDeleteError: Could not delete the range. Please try again.
customerSettings.rangeErrorInvalid: CIDR is not a syntactically valid IPv4 or IPv6 range.
customerSettings.rangeErrorPrivate: CIDR falls inside a private or reserved range (RFC 1918, IPv6 ULA, loopback, or link-local) and cannot be registered as a redaction range. Private ranges are always redacted by default.
customerSettings.rangeErrorDuplicate: CIDR is already registered for this customer.
customerSettings.rangeErrorOverlaps: CIDR overlaps with an existing registered range.
customerSettings.rangeErrorCapExceeded: This customer already has the maximum number of registered ranges.
customerSettings.applyExistingPreviewError: Could not load the preview. Please close this dialog and try again.
customerSettings.applyExistingJobQueued: Job queued ({status}). It will run in the background.
customerSettings.applyExistingTriggerGenericError: Could not start the re-redact job. Please try again.
customerSettings.retentionDescription: Set how long ingested events and analysis results are retained.
customerSettings.retentionTooShort: Retention must be at least 30 days.
customerSettings.retentionConfirmShortenFinite: Reducing the retention window will cause rows beyond the new window to be deleted on the next sweep. Continue?
customerSettings.retentionConfirmShortenUnlimited: Switching from unlimited to a finite window will cause analysis rows beyond the new window to be deleted on the next sweep. Continue?

accountSettings.title: Account Settings
accountSettings.description: Set your preferred language and timezone. These preferences are saved to your account and apply across devices.
accountSettings.languageHelp: The language used across the app. Takes effect on your next navigation.
accountSettings.timezoneHelp: Your preferred timezone, saved to your account. It does not change how timestamps are displayed yet — the preference is stored for an upcoming release.

reports.fallbackNotice: The {language} report isn't available yet — showing the English version.
reports.jobPreparing: Preparing the {language} report… this page updates automatically when it's ready.
reports.jobFailed: Could not prepare the {language} report. Showing the English version for now.
reports.jobPendingSource: This report is still being generated. The {language} version will be available once the base report is ready.
